# moemail-master Project Memory

## Project Overview
Next.js email management app \(if-mail.tech\). Uses Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Drizzle ORM, Cloudflare Workers.

## Key Roles & Permissions
- File: `app/lib/permissions.ts`
- Roles: EMPEROR > DUKE > KNIGHT > CIVILIAN
- EMPEROR: all permissions \(manage_email, manage_webhook, promote_user, manage_config, manage_api_key\)
- DUKE: manage_email, manage_webhook, manage_api_key
- KNIGHT: manage_email, manage_webhook
- CIVILIAN: no permissions

## Key Files
- Main user dashboard: `app/[locale]/moe/page.tsx` + `app/components/emails/three-column-layout.tsx`
- Dashboard overview cards: `app/components/emails/user-dashboard-overview.tsx`
- Role hook: `app/hooks/use-user-role.ts`
- Send permission hook: `app/hooks/use-send-permission.ts`
- Admin sidebar: `app/components/admin/sidebar.tsx`
- Middleware \(auth/routing\): `middleware.ts`

## Changes Made
1. `user-dashboard-overview.tsx`: Role-based card visibility
   - Send Status card: only DUKE + EMPEROR
   - Feature access badges on Role card \(locked/unlocked icons\)
   - Dynamic grid: 4-col for DUKE/EMPEROR, 3-col for KNIGHT/CIVILIAN
2. `three-column-layout.tsx`: Mobile breadcrumb navigation indicator
3. `app/[locale]/moe/page.tsx`: Added `h-dvh` + reduced mobile padding `px-3`

## User/Admin Credentials \(for testing\)
- Admin: imamfancas / 12345678
EOF)
